system.notes: A hydraulic boom for lifting heavy loads (vehicle must be stationary and chocked; not available on Body-0 vehicles). The crane has its own Load Rating up to the Crane Capacity Table max by Body: B1 25 kg, B2 200, B3 750, B4 2,000, B5 5,000, B6 20,000, B7 30,000, B8 45,000, B9 60,000, B10+ Body²×750. Parts cost = Load Rating × 100¥; 35 CF; load −(Body × 80) kg; Avail 6/14 days; Street Index 2. Rigger 2 p.143–144.
